title: Blur Forge (Unofficial)
description: Unofficial port of Blur Fabric on the Forge
body:
![Blur](https://i.imgur.com/PoBrnNM.jpg)

## <center>Unofficial port of [Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) to new versions of Minecraft on Forge.</center>

*<center>Blur* adds a Gaussian blur shader to the background of all GUIs, which fades into give it a sleek look. It is also highly configurable, so you can tune the look of the mod to your liking.</center>

![Demonstration](https://i.imgur.com/EmSEKFu.gif)
